overview: An AI-powered voice writer that records your speech, automatically transcribes it, and uses AI to remove filler words and organize the content into a clean, polished text — ready to copy or export. All UI is in Bengali, optimized for Android phones.
features: Live waveform animation and elapsed timer
AI transcription triggered automatically on stop
Smart AI cleanup removes filler words and organizes into polished paragraphs
Toggle between original and cleaned transcript
Recording history with title, date, and duration
